headlines.headline: Brevep Systems secures $320M contract with a top-tier research institute

sentiment.reasoning: Securing another large $320M contract reinforces the company's growth trajectory and revenue visibility.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
